title: Silky Thai Garlic Stir-fry
description: A herbal and silky garlic stir-fry dish designed as a post-workout polish for its nourishing blend of herbs and garlic.

ingredients.name: Red bell pepper
ingredients.amount: 1 medium, optional for added color and texture

instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add sliced garlic and ginger; stir for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add green onions, bell peppers, and snow peas to the pan. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender yet crisp.
Fold in cilantro leaves if using, allowing them to wilt slightly into the dish before serving.
Serve hot as a nutritious snack post-workout.
